**Gubernatorial Candidate Phil Scott and Lt. Governor Candidate Randy Brock to Hold Joint Announcement**

**WHAT: Announcement & Press Conference **

Colchester, Vt. – Lt. Governor Phil Scott, and former State Auditor and State Senator Randy Brock will hold a joint announcement Wednesday in Colchester.

Scott and Brock, who are running for Vermont’s two top offices, have been strong advocates for fiscal responsibility and served together in the State Senate.

[](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/36800122:W0sRs5YNS:m:1:1155937413:8C143DB7F673FF4BF54EF88FCD415009:r)

Peter,

It's hard to believe. It's been almost 30 years now since my first book, _The Art of the Deal_ , was published in 1987.

You may remember how it became an instant sensation, reaching #1 on the _New York Times_ Bestseller List and staying on the list for 51 straight weeks. To this day it remains one of the best-selling business books of all time, with more than a million copies sold.

**It 's a book about thinking big and taking action to succeed** - its lessons are more true than ever, and _exactly what our nation needs_ in this time of crisis and hardship.

[**Peter, I 've signed an out-of-print, hardcover copy of _The Art of the Deal_ just for you, because I want you on board with Team Trump! JOIN the movement today, with a contribution of $184 or more, and my assistant will drop it in the mail to you.**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/36800122:W0sRs5YNS:m:1:1155937413:8C143DB7F673FF4BF54EF88FCD415009:r)
[](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/36800122:W0sRs5YNS:m:1:1155937413:8C143DB7F673FF4BF54EF88FCD415009:r)
[**This is a special opportunity - there are a very limited number of these books I was able to sign. I hope you will claim your copy without delay.**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/36800122:W0sRs5YNS:m:1:1155937413:8C143DB7F673FF4BF54EF88FCD415009:r)

Today we have elected and appointed political leaders who are not very smart. _They think small, and have made terrible deals for our country._

As a result, we've lost MILLIONS of good-paying jobs and our middle class has been decimated. Wall Street, the special interests and their bought-and-sold career politicians have conspired to take away so many families' means of making a living.

**The American people are fed up! That 's why we've surged past Crooked Hillary in recent polls, and continue to build tremendous momentum all across America.**

[**Join our movement today, and we 'll get your signed copy of _The Art of the Deal_ in the mail right away.**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/36800122:W0sRs5YNS:m:1:1155937413:8C143DB7F673FF4BF54EF88FCD415009:r)

Peter, I am taking on the rigged political system, the failed career politicians and the lying liberal media to put America First.

If elected, _I will always think big and take action to get the deals we need_ , so that together we can Make America Great Again!

One of the key success lessons from _The Art of the Deal_ is "get the word out" - and as it is true in business, it is equally if not more true in running a campaign.

**That 's why your involvement is so important to me.** Every bit of financial support we gather helps get our message in front of more voters... and when we do that, we win!

[**Join Team Trump today to fight for a better future for our country and our people.**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/36800122:W0sRs5YNS:m:1:1155937413:8C143DB7F673FF4BF54EF88FCD415009:r)

Thank you.

Best Wishes,

[](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/36800122:W0sRs5YNS:m:1:1155937413:8C143DB7F673FF4BF54EF88FCD415009:r)

Donald J. Trump
Republican Nominee for President of the United States

P.S. I'm going to use the lessons from _The Art of the Deal_ to make great deals for America again. I am running to put America First and fight for our people, and your help is so important to our success.

[**Your signed copy of my book is waiting. Please respond today to claim it.**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/36800122:W0sRs5YNS:m:1:1155937413:8C143DB7F673FF4BF54EF88FCD415009:r)

[GET YOURS NOW](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/36800122:W0sRs5YNS:m:1:1155937413:8C143DB7F673FF4BF54EF88FCD415009:r)

name: Ben Carson
subject: Did you know about this?
body:
Peter,

This past Saturday, July 30th, was a big anniversary. Did you
know about it?

On that day 60 years ago, President Eisenhower signed legislation
establishing "In God We Trust" as America's national motto. It's
been on our currency ever since, as a reminder.

When he introduced the original bill in the U.S. House of
Representatives, Congressman Charles Edward Bennett of Florida
declared, "In these days when imperialistic and materialistic
communism seeks to attack and destroy freedom, we should
continually look for ways to strengthen the foundations of our
freedom."

As we sought to differentiate ourselves from the Soviet Union,
the American people and our leaders looked to God for strength.
Now, 60 years later, we require that same embrace of faith and a
renewal of our respect for religious liberty, because it's the
cornerstone of our freedom.

Here at My Faith Votes, that is what we are working to initiate
every single day. And we're making incredibly steady progress.
Our 120-day plan to identify, educate and activate Christian
voters is underway and going strong. Just this week, we'll be
holding yet another LIVE Interactive TeleForum, this time with
special guest Phil Robertson of Duck Dynasty.

I ask you now to help us press on. To commemorate the 60th
anniversary of our national motto, we need 60 supporters in each
state to make a tax-deductible donation of just $10. It's a goal
that we can absolutely achieve with your help. Will you step up
now?
http://email.bencarson.com/ct/36805535:soL-V5YlN:m:3:876315805:1F2E91AADECEA2AB8DE7507FA943614F:r

It is very unfortunate, but we now live in an age where even our
national motto has come under attack. You and I know that trust
in God makes us stronger, both as individuals and as a nation.
But that's no longer a given.

Many in our society, and particularly in our government, want to
whitewash our history and move America closer to a secular
European model that places its faith in the state rather than
God.

At every level possible, we must push back. First, that requires
us to care. And then it requires us to participate. That's what
I'm asking you to do today.

Think back to just 60 years ago. A nation in danger looked to God
for guidance. We embraced our religious freedom as a unifying
strength.

That doesn't just have to be our history. It can be our future as
well.

I ask you to please stand up, and help us empower and mobilize
the silent Christian majority. We need just 60 people per state
to make a tax-deductible donation of $10. I hope that today, you
will be one of them.
http://email.bencarson.com/ct/36805535:soL-V5YlN:m:3:876315805:1F2E91AADECEA2AB8DE7507FA943614F:r

Thank you for your commitment. Your faith matters.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

| **Phil Scott Releases New Radio Ad in the Lead Up to the August 9th Primary** _Scott doubles down on expanding the economy and making Vermont more affordable as top priorities_
Montpelier, Vt. – Phil Scott’s second radio ad hit the airwaves yesterday in which he highlights his priorities and contrasts his approach to leadership with his opponent's.

In the 60-second ad, Scott says: “Expanding the economy and making Vermont more affordable will be the top priorities when I am Governor.” Scott adds that he will “modernize and restructure state government to make it less expensive and more productive” so that Vermonters can “keep more of what [they] earn.” Scott further contrasts his experience as a consensus builder to the isolating tactics of his opponent’s campaign by adding, “As governor, I will work with anyone...who shares these [fiscal] priorities.”

Scott concludes by calling on voters to join his “honest campaign based on Vermont values and clear priorities” by casting their ballot in the August 9th primary for the candidate doing it “The Vermont Way.”

To listen to the full ad click **[here](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=7e94e63f3f&e=19cebfe173)**.

Listen, Learn, Lead: Meet Phil Scott
Phil Scott has been a consistent voice of reason and common sense in Montpelier. As the only Republican elected to statewide office, Phil has shown determination and leadership in advocating for Vermonters, fighting for affordability and promoting policies and programs that benefit Vermont families and the economy. Read about Phil Scott’s plans at [www.philscott.org](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=157267e5c7&e=19cebfe173)

Friend,

To me, it's fairly simple. When my kids grow up, my two daughters deserve equal pay for equal work, just like their younger brother. That's why I put together an Equal Pay Task Force as governor -- and why this week, I'm asking businesses across our state to join me in this fight.

My opponent Greg Gianforte disagrees. He hasn't supported the Montana Paycheck Fairness Act that will help end the wage gap. It's just one more example of what is at stake in this election.

Steve

**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
** Contact: Yvette Ollada 253.220.5051 | Yvette@billbryantforgovernor.com

August 2, 2016
**
Bryant advances to the general election
**
(Spokane, WA) Tuesday night, the first day's results from the primary election were released and as predicted, Bill Bryant advanced to the general election. Whenever an incumbent receives less than 50 percent, that is a vote of no confidence. Combining the 42 percent of the vote received by the two Republican “Bills” shows a tight 42 to 48 percent race heading into the general election. “These results show people want new leadership," said Bill Bryant, who spent primary election night in Spokane. "I am going to keep talking about equitably funding education, fixing our traffic mess, generating family wage jobs, finding solutions to homelessness, rebuilding salmon runs, and fixing the broken Department of Corrections, Department of Social and Health Services and Western State Hospital. It's time to get stuff done."

**Lt. Gov. Candidate Randy Brock, 100+ Republican Leaders Endorse Phil Scott for Governor** **_Brock says Scott is ‘Leader with Tremendous Integrity’_** **_Duo pledge to work together to oppose new taxes and strengthen economy_**
Colchester, VT – Randy Brock today was the leading voice in a chorus of long-time Republican leaders and activists endorsing Phil Scott for Governor.

Scott said he was grateful to Brock for the endorsement and looked forward to working with him on their shared goals.

“As a former State Auditor, State Senator, and vice president of risk management at one of the largest private companies in the country, Randy has a strong background in fiscal management and accountability. He is a true public servant with the right skills, ethics and experience for serving as Lt. Governor, Scott said. “We have worked together before in the Senate and I look forward to working with him again to implement my plan to make government more efficient, our economy stronger and our state more affordable for families and businesses. I know he is the right person for the job as he shares my vision of putting principle before politics. Randy believes as I do that we must work together in order to restore faith and trust in state government.”

In the mean time, both Scott and Brock pledged to work together to support Republican candidates up and down the ticket.

“I am supporting Phil Scott because I know he is a fighter for working Vermonters and will oppose all new taxes. Phil and I share the same goals for growing Vermont’s economy and making Vermont more affordable. We also know how vitally important it is to the future of our state to have more balance in Montpelier,” Brock said. “Phil Scott is someone I know will set clear pro-growth priorities and bring people together to get real results. Most importantly, he is a leader with tremendous integrity who we can count on to restore faith and trust in the Governor’s office. That is why I am pleased to be supporting him in this election and why I look forward to working with him again in Montpelier.”

**MORE THAN 100 REPUBLICAN LEADERS ENDORSE SCOTT**
Scott has received the support of more than 100 Republican lawmakers, former legislators, former candidates for office, and GOP officials from all across Vermont. This show of support by Vermont Republican leaders comes two and a half months after Scott announced the [overwhelming support of 56 sitting Republican legislators](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=1b441ed25d&e=19cebfe173).

Vermont Republican leaders know that Phil Scott is a lifelong Vermont Republican who has been with them in the trenches fighting to make Vermont a better state and is the right candidate to lead Vermont forward.

“It is long past time to put a leader in the Governor’s office who Vermonters can count on, and I’m confident that Phil Scott will deliver. Phil will place Vermont back on the right track toward economic prosperity,” said former Vermont Republican Party Chair Paul T. Carroccio of Bennington County.

“As a working Vermonter himself, Phil has run a campaign that puts Vermonters first. As Governor, he’ll work hard to restore faith and trust in state government and to address the growing crisis of affordability that so many Vermonters are facing,” added former State Representative Connie Houston (R-Ferrisburgh).

“It’s an honor to have the support of so many former lawmakers and Vermont GOP officials. They can be confident that as governor, I will focus on growing our economy, work tirelessly to make Vermont more affordable, and restore faith and trust in government,” said Scott.

body:

| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c91/738133e4/3777e8f6/7f82ff3d/1197517561/VEsH/ "https://www.murphyforflorida.com/landing/e160803/?subsource=ngpattre160803")
---
| Friend -- This is a serious moment for the environment in our state:
* Lake Okeechobee discharges have led to one of the worst**toxic algae blooms** Florida has ever seen -- and we've witnessed firsthand the damage they've caused to our environment, our economy, and our communities this summer.
* Algae toxins have now been found**in the air** we breathe, posing serious health risks if ingested or inhaled.
* Plus, last week Rick Scott's environmental division updated standards to allow **higher levels of cancer-causing toxins and pollutants in our water.** (Yes, seriously.)

It's been one of Patrick's priorities in Congress to work towards solutions to these serious threats. [**Will you add your name to fight for Florida 's environment?**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c91/738133e4/3777e8f6/7f82ff3d/1197517561/VEsE/ "https://www.murphyforflorida.com/landing/e160803/?subsource=ngpattre160803") | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c91/738133e4/3777e8f6/7f82ff3d/1197517561/VEsF/ "https://www.murphyforflorida.com/landing/e160803/?subsource=ngpattre160803")
---
While Rick Scott and Marco Rubio continue to let us down with their inaction, Patrick delivered a sample of toxic algae to Rick Scott's office last week, because the Governor refuses to come to the Treasure Coast and see it firsthand. When Marco Rubio **finally** visited sites of the algae bloom after years of inaction, he was booed out of town. This from the guy who denies the scientific consensus that humans are causing climate change. **Florida deserves better than Rubio and Scott 's backwards environmental policies.**
Rick Scott and Marco Rubio can't continue to gamble with Floridians' health and safety like this -- it's unacceptable. We're tired of the same old excuses. We deserve representation that will stand up to the special interests to protect our health and environment. And we have a moral obligation to future generations to fix this. [**Sign here to send Scott and Rubio a message: it 's time to act! >>**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c91/738133e4/3777e8f6/7f82ff3d/1197517561/VEsC/ "https://www.murphyforflorida.com/landing/e160803/?subsource=ngpattre160803")

Thank you,
Team Murphy

Hi,
I started my public service career in rural Missouri -- working as the County Prosecutor in Harrisonville. My time there wasn't about politics or advancing an agenda. It was about helping people, delivering justice, and finding victims the resources they needed to get back on their feet.

This mission still drives me today, and that's why I've chosen to highlight this work in [our first television commercial](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6452810981557532672/4320218180913334272?utm_campaign=fnd_person_vb&utm_medium=email&utm_source=koster&refcode=em16_160803_fnd_gq_person_ful_vb_ck), launching across Missouri today.

[**Watch our first ad and then make a contribution to help us keep it on the air.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6452810981557532672/4320218180913334272?utm_campaign=fnd_person_vb&utm_medium=email&utm_source=koster&refcode=em16_160803_fnd_gq_person_ful_vb_ck)

Through my years of service in Harrisonville, and as State Senator and Attorney General, I've learned firsthand that our government works best if every step is about helping people -- person by person. As your Governor, I promise to never lose sight of this commitment.

[With your contribution today](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6452810981557532672/4320218180913334272?utm_campaign=fnd_person_vb&utm_medium=email&utm_source=koster&refcode=em16_160803_fnd_gq_person_ful_vb_ck), we'll continue to spread this message across Missouri and work together to move our state forward.

Chris Koster

subject: Protecting the promise [Add your name]
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/5810781646986674176/4660405378654142464?code=mcginty)
---
Friend,

The promise of Social Security is one that families have counted on for generations. But today, this sacred promise is in serious danger and Republican lawmakers want to change the deal.

Every day for decades, my mom and dad worked hard to support our family, and when they retired, they were able to do so in part because they knew they could count on the guarantee of Social Security and Medicare.

I've seen first hand the difference these critical programs make for working families, and we can't afford to let Republicans like Pat Toomey dismantle them. [**Add your name if you agree >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5810781646986674176/4660405378654142464?code=mcginty)

It's clear that Toomey is too out-of-touch to see that these critical programs are keeping millions from falling into poverty. Instead, he's fought to privatize Social Security--trying to make billions for his pals on Wall Street while risking seniors' retirement.

Our seniors have earned these benefits, and they deserve lawmakers who will protect them, not shortchange them. In the Senate, I will stand firm against any attack on Social Security and work to ensure that all seniors have the resources they need to retire with dignity.

[**Will you join me in telling Republicans in Congress that we need to strengthen and expand Social Security for our seniors?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5810781646986674176/4660405378654142464?code=mcginty)

Thanks for taking a stand,

Katie

body:
Here's the rundown: | Peter --

It is only Wednesday, and already Trump has had a hell of a week. I want to make sure you know exactly what kind of chaos he’s causing this time -- so take a look at the rundown below.

**[Don’t need to read the list to know that Trump has been up to no good? Add your name to volunteer and make sure he doesn’t get anywhere near the White House:](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjYxNDczMjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYwNTYyNjIyS0&mt=2&rj=ODYwNTYyNjIyS0&rt=0)**
* Trump has straight-up called Hillary Clinton “the devil.”
* In an interview, Trump claimed that Putin would not invade Ukraine -- something Putin has already done. The explanation Trump’s co-chairman offered for his mixup is that Trump had been “thinking about something else.”
* Trump and his son Eric claimed that Ivanka Trump would never “allow herself” to be sexually harassed on the job because she's "strong" -- but if she were, the solution would simply be for her to “find another career or another company.”
* Trump adviser Al Baldasaro accused Khizr Khan of being connected to the Muslim Brotherhood, and his deceased son and Purple Heart recipient, U.S. Captain Khan, of being a radical jihadist. Just over two weeks ago, Baldasaro called for Hillary to be “shot for treason” -- yet wasn’t removed from the campaign.
* Trump kicked a baby out of a rally. Seriously.

And in response to the fallout from this weekend, Trump is taking the ultimate coward’s route: He’s already claiming that the debate schedule and the election will be rigged, and that a Hillary win would be illegitimate.

**Peter, we have to stop him. This can’t be our new normal. We can’t get used to it. We can’t let him define the standards of what a political candidate (or a person!) can or can’t say. Don’t let him continue from the Oval Office. Christina

clean_body: Here's the rundown: | Peter -- It is only Wednesday, and already Trump has had a hell of a week. I want to make sure you know exactly what kind of chaos he’s causing this time -- so take a look at the rundown below. Trump has straight-up called Hillary Clinton “the devil.” In an interview, Trump claimed that Putin would not invade Ukraine -- something Putin has already done. The explanation Trump’s co-chairman offered for his mixup is that Trump had been “thinking about something else.” Trump and his son Eric claimed that Ivanka Trump would never “allow herself” to be sexually harassed on the job because she's "strong" -- but if she were, the solution would simply be for her to “find another career or another company.” Trump adviser Al Baldasaro accused Khizr Khan of being connected to the Muslim Brotherhood, and his deceased son and Purple Heart recipient, U.S. Captain Khan, of being a radical jihadist. Just over two weeks ago, Baldasaro called for Hillary to be “shot for treason” -- yet wasn’t removed from the campaign. Trump kicked a baby out of a rally. Seriously. And in response to the fallout from this weekend, Trump is taking the ultimate coward’s route: He’s already claiming that the debate schedule and the election will be rigged, and that a Hillary win would be illegitimate. Peter, we have to stop him. This can’t be our new normal. We can’t get used to it. We can’t let him define the standards of what a political candidate (or a person!) can or can’t say. Don’t let him continue from the Oval Office. name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Let's get started
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution
body:
#
Sisters, Brothers, and Friends,
Election days come and go, but the struggle for economic, social, racial and environmental justice continues. Together, we built something special and unprecedented through our presidential campaign. Now, we are going to take the next steps for our political revolution.
We are building a new organization called Our Revolution. Our goal will be the same as in our campaign: we must work to transform American society by making our political and economic systems work for all of us, not just the 1 percent.
[Can you make a $3 contribution to Our Revolution so that we can continue our critical work to take back our country from the billionaire class? Make your contribution here.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/transform-america?refcode=em160803 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/transform-america?refcode=em160803")
On the very first day of our campaign, I wrote to my supporters and said, "This campaign is not about Bernie Sanders. It's about a grassroots movement of Americans standing up and saying: 'Enough is enough. This country and our government belong to all of us, not just a handful of billionaires.'"
That is as true today as it was then. That is why Our Revolution will focus on three distinct areas of work:
1. **Revitalizing American democracy** by bringing millions of working people and young people into the political system.
2. **Empowering the next generation of progressive leaders** by inspiring, recruiting and supporting progressive candidates across the entire spectrum of government - from school board to the U.S. Senate.
3. Doing what the corporate media does not do: **elevating political consciousness** by educating the public about the most pressing issues confronting our nation and the bold solutions needed to address them.

Together we can revitalize our democracy, empower new progressive leaders, and educate the public about the critical issues facing our country. To get started, I need your help. Will you join me?
[Add a $3 contribution to Our Revolution and be one of the first to join this next phase of our movement.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/transform-america?refcode=em160803 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/transform-america?refcode=em160803")
We have a lot to do together and I'm glad you're with me.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

**Phil Scott’s New TV Ad Outlines His Plans as Governor** _In his third TV ad ahead of the August 9 primary, Scott stays focused on his plans to grow the economy and make Vermont more affordable_
**Middlesex, Vt.–** Phil Scott, candidate for governor, today released his third television advertisement in a series of ads in advance of the August 9 primary that have highlighted his positive leadership, priorities and plans to move Vermont forward.

In the 30-second spot, Scott details his plans for strengthening Vermont’s economy, reigning in government spending and making Vermont more affordable.

“As Governor, I’ll make the economy and affordability Montpelier’s top priorities. I’ll implement a comprehensive economic growth plan, make state government more efficient, and stop raising taxes,” Scott explains.

Scott continues: “as Governor, I will never support a budget that grows faster than the economy. And we’ll get property tax and health care reform back on track. Most importantly, I’ll always listen, and I won’t let you down.”

Speaking about the campaign, Scott spokesperson Brittney Wilson stated: “We’re proud to have run a positive campaign, focused on the issues and an honest representation of Phil’s integrity and work ethic. It’s exciting to see our positive message play out in our TV ad series and we believe Vermonters appreciate hearing directly from Phil on the issues and his proposals to improve our economy.”

Learn more about Scott’s principles and read his proposals at [www.philscott.org](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=938735a60f&e=19cebfe173). Watch the full advertisement here:

I don't know about you, but when the biggest progressive groups, key Senators, the Vice President, and the President ALL say the same thing, I listen. And what they're saying is that we NEED to elect Governor Hassan if we're going to take back the Senate, secure the future of the Supreme Court, and get Congress working for Granite State families.

body:
"Rigged Election?" | Peter --

We all know this election is close. We all know that either side could win.

Earlier this week, Donald Trump began planting seeds of his possible loss in November, warning his supporters that, if Hillary wins, the election will surely have been stolen.

"I'm afraid the election is going to be rigged, I have to be honest," he said, before telling Fox News soon after: "I hope the Republicans are watching closely or it's going to be taken away from us."

That means just one thing: We need to defeat Donald Trump so definitively on Election Day that no one gets distracted by any groundless, erroneous (and infuriating) claims that we Democrats “stole” the race.

We held an incredible convention last week, and we need to capitalize on that momentum to ensure that Trump isn’t anywhere near Hillary in the polls come November. We need to do our damnedest to guarantee that our ticket is so far ahead when the votes are counted that no one even gives an ear to Trump’s trouble-stirring, desperate claims of rigged results.

**Can you chip in $1 now to help Hillary and Tim win? When you do, we’ll send you a free sticker to say thank you -- every dollar matters as we make our way to the finish line:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjYxNDg3MDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYwNTc1MzgzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks so much -- I knew we could count on you,

Christina

| Everyone, you've got to see what Marco Rubio said this weekend. It's frightening: **"We will win in November, Donald will win, I will win, we will win, and we will reclaim this country." _\-- Marco Rubio_** We have to stop them. We can't risk a Donald Trump presidency and another term of Mitch and Marco's GOP Senate.

But Rubio knows that's why this race is so important. He knows that not just Senate control, but also the future of the Supreme Court and the American presidency, hang in the balance here in Florida. If Republicans win, it would be a HUGE step backwards for America. We need to raise $15,000 in the next 48 hours to fight back. [**Can you chip in $7 to our Rapid Response fund to stop them?**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c8a/738133e4/3775e6cd/7f82f2ac/599029330/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160804b?refcode=pme160804b_b&recurring=true&amount=25")

Rubio won't answer if he thinks Donald Trump can be trusted with the nuclear codes. He refused to un-endorse Trump after his appalling attacks on the Khans, a Gold Star family who lost their son in Iraq. And now, instead of standing up to Donald Trump's racism, misogyny, and increasingly horrifying rhetoric, **Marco Rubio is actually rallying voters for him.** It's horrible. It shows yet again that he puts his own political ambition over the interests of Floridians.

**Can you chip in $7 now to help us take down Marco Rubio and the party of Trump?** | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c8a/738133e4/3775e6cd/7f82f2ad/599029330/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160804b?refcode=pme160804b_b&recurring=true&amount=3")
